description_long: This is a tall, conical plastic shampoo bottle with a slightly flared base and a narrower, ribbed neck leading up to a red screw cap. The bottle is predominantly off-white with visible signs of dirt and wear, suggesting it has been discarded or left outdoors for some time. The front label features bold red text, including the prominent word 'AJAX', and additional Italian writing, with some faded or partially obscured areas. The cap is ribbed for grip and has a small protrusion at the top, likely for tamper evidence or ease of opening. The bottle's surface appears matte and somewhat rough, with grime and residue accentuating its aged appearance. There are no visible decorative graphics aside from the text and a simple red band wrapping part of the lower section.
description: A tall, conical, off-white plastic shampoo bottle with a red screw cap and bold red Italian text, showing signs of dirt and outdoor wear. The surface is matte and rough, with a prominent 'AJAX' label on the front.
description_view_0: The bottle is seen from the side, showing the ribbed neck, red cap, and faint, partially visible text on the upper body.
description_view_1: This angle reveals more of the red label wrapping around the lower half, with some dirt and a partial view of the 'AJAX' text.
description_view_2: The front view displays the full 'AJAX' branding in bold red letters, with additional Italian text and the most complete view of the label.
description_view_3: The bottle is shown from the opposite side, with the label partially visible and more dirt and wear apparent on the surface.
attribute_label_text: RIBASSATO L 150 AJAX con cannuccia passol
attribute_bottle_silhouette: tall, conical body with a narrow, ribbed neck and a small cap
attribute_packaging_graphics: Simple red band and block color elements; no decorative motifs or illustrations

license_info.creator_display_name: Archeoplastica: il museo dei rifiuti spiaggiati
